_comment: Manual provision overrides for bills where LLM auto-extraction needs correction.

policies.provision_text: Expands Child Tax Credit and restores bonus depreciation and R&D expensing

hr-7024-118.override_reason: Confirmed against CBO score of -$33.5B; CTC expansion + R&D/depreciation provisions
